_metadata.description: This file uses v18 (T0xxx) IDs as primary keys for backward compat. For each entry that has been re-classified in v19 (April 2026), we provide v19_id, v19_name, v19_parent, and v19_status fields.

T0800.reason: Network-observable: S7comm firmware_module/firmware_full and EtherNet/IP firmware_update/boot_firmware CIP services.

T0879.reason: Damage to Property is by definition an effect, not directly observable on the network. Covered as the primary mapping of CHAIN__damage_to_property__substation, where the chain framing connects observable steps (T0846, T0888, T0878, T0855, T0856) into a damage-causing sequence consistent with the 2015/2016 Ukrainian power grid incidents. Confidence: medium (chain framing is interpretive).
